avian_alarm.description: A distributed network of particularly observant cage birds.
avian_alarm.name: Avian Alarm

stages.description: Deploy a bird trap next to the Buoys
stages.name: Initial Flock Intake

stages.name: Preliminary Signal birds

stages.description: Secondary Validation Birds

stages.name: Heightened Alert Birds

expedition.description: Expeditions are perilous. Your Raider will carry all their possessions into the unknown beyond the Rust Belt. In return, your next Raider gains a unique edge that lasts until the next Expedition departs.
expedition.name: Expedition Project (Expedition 2)

stages.description: Building the base structure and frame of the caravan
stages.name: Foundation

stages.description: Connecting wiring, ventilation, and essential power systems
stages.name: Core Systems

stages.description: Building walls and roof, installing core systems, and defining the interior layout
stages.name: Framework

stages.description: Adding storage, workbenches, utilities, and personal touches
stages.name: Outfitting

stages.description: Loading the caravan with vital supplies. Combat gear, survival equipment, provisions, and repair materials are needed to fully prepare for the Expedition
stages.name: Load Stage

categories: Ammo, Grenades, Traps, Weapons, Weapon Mods
Nature, Miscellaneous, Trinkets, Old World, Keys

stages.description:
Your caravan is fully stocked and your Raider is ready to depart on the Expedition!

Upon departure, all items remaining in your Raider’s stash will be contributed to the Expedition, and your next Raider can earn up to five skill points based on the total value of those items.
stages.name: Departure

flickering_flames.description: A festival of resilient warmth, centered around the hardy candleberry bush.
flickering_flames.name: Flickering Flames

stages.description: The namesake use for the candleberry, Speranzans boil the fruit into a thick wax that burns cleanly and fragrantly.
stages.name: Candlelight

stages.description: Many Speranzans have become surprisingly adept at the art of bringing beauty and greenery into the home.
stages.name: Decorations

stages.description: Crafty Speranzans have turned the candleberries into a wealth of gifts. These include perfumes and soaps, as well as gifts unrelated to the recipients odors.
stages.name: Presents

stages.description: Candleberries can be crushed into refreshing juices, while the leaves and roots make for a tea that can drive out the toughest of colds.
stages.name: Beverages

stages.description: Though the candleberry leaves are bitter, simmering them in stew and soups adds a touch of earthiness that nostalgic Speranzans have grown to love.
stages.name: Meals

high_gain_antenna.description: With ARC's operations growing ever more destructive, Celeste has offered rewards to Raiders to help build an array of high-gain antennas, to be deployed around the Rust Belt.
high_gain_antenna.name: High-Gain Antenna

stages.description: An extra-sturdy base that can withstand anything from bitter winds to sudden cloudbursts.
stages.name: Sturdy Base

stages.description: A closed-circuit interface to monitor and analyze distributed data points over time.
stages.name: Data Logger

stages.description: A custom-built parabolic dish designed to capture distant signals in even the most stormy of conditions.
stages.name: Parabolic Dish

trophy_display.description: Though there is no shortage of bold tales in Speranza's cantinas, only the most devoted of Raiders have the hunting trophies to back them up.
trophy_display.name: Trophy Display

stages.description: The earthbound machines rolling and trudging across the surface, forcing Raiders to watch their every step.
stages.name: Roaming Threats

stages.description: The airborne machines dominating the skies, raining peril down upon unsuspecting Raiders.
stages.name: Soaring Menaces

stages.description: A clear escalation of Topside dangers, these machines have doled out severe punishments to overconfident Raiders.
stages.name: Ferocious Foes

stages.description: The vicious threats leaving behind a trail of downed Raiders; dominating their surroundings with tenacity and grit.
stages.name: Dominant Dangers

stages.description: The colossal foes making the earth tremble, and the epitome of big-game hunting.
stages.name: Imposing Behemoths

weather_monitor_system.description: As the climate of Topside grows increasingly erratic, Raiders are asked to build distributed weather stations to measure meteorologic changes.
weather_monitor_system.name: Weather Monitor System

stages.description: Lets you measure if that heavy weight on your shoulders is actually just the air.
stages.name: Atmospheric Pressure

stages.description: Sunlight might be sparse in Speranza, but ultraviolet rays can still be measured by the right equipment.
stages.name: Sunlight

stages.description: Very few parts of Speranza are completely waterproof. Now you can say it's for science.
stages.name: Precipitation

stages.description: Great for keeping your skin looking luminous, and your walls somewhat moldy.
stages.name: Humidity

stages.description: Significantly more accurate than counting shivers per minute.
stages.name: Temperature
